titleStmt.title: SII 22.368: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 368. (A.R. No. 368 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, KUḌUMIYĀMALAI. MĒLAIKKŌYIL ROCK CUT TEMPLE—ON THE ROCK TO THE NORTH OF THE CAVE (SHRINE) RĀJ. TRIBH. RĀJARĀJADĒVA II—16th YEAR (A.D. 1161—62)

summary.p: This begins with introduction Pūmaruviya Tirumādum etc. The latter portion of the inscription is damaged. It seems to record an endowment of two mā of cultivable land (ūṟal-vayal) together with the surrounding barren and saline soil after purchasing the same from the Śivabrāhmaṇas to the temple at Tirunalakkuṉṟam in Kuṉṟiyūr-nāḍu by Munaiyilādittaṉ Kodaṇḍaṉ of Śīkaranallūr in the same nāḍu. The donor appears to have already given a piece of land of his own to the temple for the celebration of some festival in the temple and for feeding Māhēśvaras in a maṭha founded (or built ?) by him.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
..svasti śrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātum jayamātum nā maruviya kalaimātum pukaḻmātum naya
ntu pulka Arumaṟaiyavar vitineṟiyaṉaittun taḻaittoṅka varumuṟai yurimaiyil maṇimuṭicūṭi tiṅkaḷ veṇkuṭait ti
caikkaḷiṟeṭṭun taṅkutanikkūṭantāneṉa viḷaṅki karuṅkalippaṭṭikai ceṅkolturappa poruṅkatirāḻi puli vaḷarttuṭaṉ
vara villavariraṭṭar miṉavar ciṅkaḷar pallavar nutaliyar pāttivar paṇiya veṇṇaruṅ kaṟpiṉ maṇṇakam purantu cempoṉvira
siṅhāsanattu puvaṉimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecari paṟmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravartti
kaḷ śrī rājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6Āvatu Iraṭṭapāṭi koṇṭa coḻavaḷa nāṭṭu kunṟiyūr nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār ti
runalakkunṟamuṭaiyāṟku Innāṭṭu cikaranallūr muṉaiyilātittaṉ kotaṇṭaneṉ Ittevar ci
vabrāhmaṇarpakkal Ivarkaḷ māṇipokattil Ūṟalvayalil koṇṭa nilam 2pa Innilam Iraṇṭu māvum Ittaic cū
ḻnta viḷaiyā veṇkaḷarukkum saṇṭeśvaradevar śrī hastattu Iṭṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 2 10 Ikkācu Irupatukkuṅ ko ve
ṇkaḷarukkum Ūṟalkuḷattukkum perunāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai tevanārkuḷattil nirkovaikkum
Ukaccarkuḷattu nir kovaikkum meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai cikaranallūr Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kai
velimaṅkalattukkup poṉa vaḻikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ūṟkuḷattu nir kovaikkuk kiḻakkunokki Ūrkku pukunta vaḻi
kkut te caitta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa nilattil muṉpu muṉaiyilātittaṉ kotaṇṭaṉ tiruttiṉa nila
m Ūru� rājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6- Āvatu veḷāṉ kotaṇṭaṉ muṉpu colla Ippaṭi Āvaṇa
k kaḷatte nerikkum vayalukkum perunāṉkellaiyāvatu Ivaṉ tirutti nāṭṭiṉa kallukku meṟkum
teṉpāṟke vaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai pañcaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai ka
kuḷattukku teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellai yilum Akappaṭṭa
ṉkuṭikku va māhēśvararum tevakaṉmikaḷum kotaṇṭaṉ kaṅkā
koṇṭu tirunāḷum tāṉkoṇṭa maṭattile vanta māheśvararai A
ṇuvate Itta veḷāṉ kotaṇṭaṉ panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.368 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
